title: ctLab: add Segor article notes
description: Goal: Add Obsidian note callouts with matching Segor article links to local ctLab articles, including the Segor overview link in Fernwirkung. Definition of Done: Matching ctLab articles contain > [!note] callouts with the relevant Segor page links, changes are verified, committed, and pushed. Notes: Use the current local ctLab file set and avoid unrelated workspace changes.

title: ctLab: audit and repair external links
description:
Goal:
Audit external links in ctLab articles, remove dead links, and replace them when a current reachable source can be found.
Definition of Done:
Each affected ctLab article has been checked, unreachable links have been removed or updated, and changes have been pushed.
Notes:
User requested one sub-agent per article.

title: ctLab: normalize Stückliste tables
description:
Goal:
Normalize Stückliste formatting in ctLab markdown articles to match ctLab/audio-pedant-291478.md.
Definition of Done:
All ctLab articles with a Stückliste use the same markdown table structure as the reference article and the changes are validated by inspection.
Notes:
Reference file: ctLab/audio-pedant-291478.md.

title: ctLab: import Heise archive articles
description:
Goal:
Download the c't Lab archive article texts and images linked from the provided Heise overview page into ./.temp/ and create markdown versions under ./ctLab/.
Definition of Done:
All discovered archive article pages from the provided link are saved locally, their images are downloaded into ./.temp/, markdown article files are created in ./ctLab/, and beads state is synced.
Notes:
Preserve source URLs in the generated markdown and avoid overwriting unrelated user changes.

title: attachments: rotate stromabnehmer image
description: Goal: Rotate Attachements/stromabnehmer-291588-04.jpeg by 90 degrees clockwise. Definition of Done: The image file is rotated in place, verified, committed, and pushed. Notes: Requested directly by the user.

title: ctLab: download firmware sources
description: Goal: Download the available c't-Lab firmware source files into ctLab/Firmware, with emphasis on clarifying the IFP case. Definition of Done: Source-bearing firmware files from the surviving mirror are stored under ctLab/Firmware, a short manifest documents what was downloaded and what has no separate firmware, and the result is committed and pushed. Notes: Do not disturb unrelated local ctLab or .obsidian changes.
